name: parallel runner: aggregated results are sorted by filePath (stable across runs/workers)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule no-eval --in "$PWD/src/**/*.js" --concurrency 4 --format json 2>r1.json; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule no-eval --in "$PWD/src/**/*.js" --concurrency 4 --format json 2>r2.json; diff r1.json r2.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup: mkdir -p src && for i in $(seq 1 20); do echo "eval(${i});" > src/f${i}.js; done
